steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence has a subject ('Sarah McAnulty') and modifying phrases but no finite (tensed) main verb. The blank must supply that verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'working': a bare participle — cannot serve as a main verb without a helper. ✗
  • Choice B — 'was working': a finite past-tense verb — completes the independent clause and matches 'In 2021.' ✓
  • Choice C — 'to work': an infinitive — cannot serve as a main verb. ✗
  • Choice D — 'to have worked': an infinitive phrase — cannot serve as a main verb. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
